decision_log.rationale: This is a dbt test (not a model), owned by @kavya.jain. It tests participation_fact_enriched and is part of the apex_experimentation tag group. No model SQL exists — it's defined in a YAML test file.

tool_calls.input: SELECT NAME, MATERIALIZATION, SCHEMA_NAME, TAGS, JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(META, 'owner') as owner FROM DW.DATAOPS_DBT.DBT_MODELS WHERE NAME = 'apex_participation_matches_participation_fact_enriched_12'
